notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed

notableEvents.label: Nasim Nuñez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nasim Nuñez grounds into a double play, second baseman Xavier Edwards to shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Liam Hicks. Drew Millas out at 2nd. Nasim Nuñez out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Curtis Mead lines out to center fielder Jakob Marsee.
